videoPlayer.ignoredSubtitleNamesHelp: Subtitle tracks that will not be selected by default if they match the preferred languages. Separate multiple names with commas.
videoPlayer.convertSoftSubsToASSHelp: The player will convert other subtitle formats (SRT, VTT, ...) to ASS. If your language is not supported, you can add a new font or disable this feature. Player reload is required after changing this option.

translationSettings.enableTranslationHelp: Automatically translate subtitle tracks to the selected language
translationSettings.deeplNote: Note: DeepL does not support all target languages.
